channel.title: toot on Sebastian Hoß
channel.description: Recent content in toot on Sebastian Hoß

item.title: Send toots with GitHub Actions
item.description: The rzr/fediverse-action action allows to send a toot in your GitHub Action. name:<NAME>jobs:build:runs-on:<RUN_ON>steps:- name:Publish Tootuses:rzr/fediverse-action@masterwith:access-token:${{ secrets.MASTODON_TOKEN }}message:<MESSAGE>host:${{ secrets.MASTODON_SERVER }} <PIPELINE>: The name of your pipeline. <RUN_ON>: The runner to use, see GitHub’s own documentation for possible values. <MESSAGE>: Message for the toot.
